# Report Card (Form 138) — Grades 2–6 — EXACT Layout

Source: 5 screenshots from the live NPS card view (SY 2025-2026), provided by Registrar
Marites C. Ramos. Samples: Grade VI (ALANO), Grade V (BADONG), Grade IV (ALIPIO),
Grade III (PINANGANG), Grade II (BADIOLA). **Replicate this layout exactly.**

> Drop the original PNGs in this folder to preserve them:
> `report-card-grade2.png` … `report-card-grade6.png`.
> Card background = parchment/tan texture. Two columns (academics left, character/
> attendance right).

## Identity header (upper area)
Right-of-center block:
- `School ID: 403875`
- `Student No: <n>`
- `LRN: <lrn>`
- `School Year: 2025-2026`

Left, below: **`LASTNAME, First Middle`** (bold) · `GRADE/SECTION: Grade <N> - <Section>`.

## LEFT COLUMN

### Academic grades table
Columns: **SUBJECTS · 1st · 2nd · 3rd · 4th · Final · Remarks**
- Quarter grades are whole numbers; `Final` is whole; `Remarks` = `Passed` / `Failed`.
- After the subjects, three summary rows:
  - **Average** — per-quarter average (may carry decimals, e.g. `79.25`, `81.375`) and a Final average.
  - **Conduct** — per-quarter **letter** (S / O …).
  - **Promoted to Grade <N+1>** (bottom-left) · **General Average: <whole>** (bottom-right).

#### Subject list PER GRADE (curriculum differs by level — reproduce exactly)
- **Grade II** (MATATAG): GMRC-CLE · Filipino · English · Mathematics · Makabansa
- **Grade III** (MATATAG): GMRC-CLE · Filipino · English · Mathematics · Science · Makabansa
- **Grade IV**: GMRC-CLE · Filipino · English · Mathematics · Science · Araling Panlipunan · EPP-ICT · MAPEH · **Music & Arts** · **Physical Edu. & Health**
- **Grade V**: GMRC-CLE · Filipino · English · Mathematics · Science · Araling Panlipunan · EPP-ICT · MAPEH · **Music & Arts** · **Physical Edu. & Health**
- **Grade VI** (old curriculum): **CLE-ESP** · Filipino · English · Mathematics · Science · Araling Panlipunan · EPP-ICT · MAPEH · **Music** · **Arts** · **Physical Education** · **Health**

> MAPEH: the MAPEH row shows the area grade per quarter + Final; its component rows
> (Music/Arts/PE/Health, or Music&Arts / PE&Health) appear directly beneath. Grades 4–5
> collapse MAPEH into 2 components; Grade 6 shows all 4. Grade 2 has no Science; Grades
> 2–3 use "Makabansa" and have no EPP/MAPEH.

### ACADEMIC legend (bottom-left)
| Descriptors | Grading Scale | Remark |
|-------------|---------------|--------|
| Outstanding | 90-100 | Passed |
| Very Satisfactory | 85-89 | Passed |
| Satisfactory | 80-84 | Passed |
| Fairly Satisfactory | 75-79 | Passed |
| Did not meet expectations | Below 75 | Failed |

## RIGHT COLUMN

### SPECIAL PROGRAMS table
Columns: **SUBJECTS · 1st · 2nd · 3rd · 4th · FINAL** — values are letters (O, VS, MO).
Rows vary by grade:
- Grades II–III: **Computer** · Homeroom Guidance · SAP · (Scouting for Gr III)
- Grades IV–VI: Homeroom Guidance · SAP · Scouting

### DEPORTMENT — CORE VALUES table
Columns: **CORE VALUES · 1st · 2nd · 3rd · 4th · FINAL** — values are letters (AO/SO/RO/NO).
Rows: **Faith · Integrity · Respect · Excellence · Social Responsibility**.
Legend line: `AO - Always Observed (91-100)  SO - Sometimes Observed (86-90)  RO - Rarely Observed (80-85)  NO - Not Observed (75-79)`.

### ATTENDANCE REPORT table
Row headers: **School Days · Days Present · Days Absent · Times Tardy**.
Columns: **Jun Jul Aug Sep Oct Nov Dec Jan Feb Mar Apr · Total**. (Values may carry .0/.5.)

### CERTIFICATION
> This is to certify that `LASTNAME, First Middle` is eligible for transfer and
> admission to **Grade <N+1>**.

Signatories: left = **Class Adviser** (e.g. MRS. MYLA S. SAYSON); right = **Principal**
(MRS. ROSARIO OLALIA). Names in the adviser/principal color style (adviser dark,
principal reddish as displayed).

### CANCELLATION OF TRANSFER ELIGIBILITY
`Admitted in ______` · `Date: ______` · `______ Principal` (blank lines to fill in).

### Red status text
**`Not valid for transfer.`** in red at the bottom of the card.

## Footer controls (outside the card)
- **`☐ Valid for transfer.`** checkbox
- **`TO PDF`** button (exports the card to PDF)

### Behavior
- Every card has this checkbox + TO PDF button.
- When **`Valid for transfer` is CHECKED**, the red **"Not valid for transfer."** text is
  **hidden/removed** from the card (i.e. it only shows when the card is NOT valid for transfer).
